old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-ny2e","title":"Insufficient test coverage for packet_hash standardization and metrics","description":"test_simulation_validation.py only superficially checks 'packet_hashes' in JSON (line 147); no assertions on hash length (32 chars), TX/RX hash matching, cross-Python/Rust consistency, or sim_client.py hashes.
